description: Composition Red scooped neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, felt tape lining on the inside of the neck and chest print Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Set the trend for others to follow by rolling into this gypsy styled t-shirt from lee. The beautiful woman of the 60's is all set to take your peers by storm and you would certainly be the cynosure of all eyes. Team it with stilettos and slim Fit denims for a classy look. Throw in some chunky metal accessories to transform yourself into an ultimate glam queen. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
